description: Test basis function optimization with Chebyshev polynomials

optimization_parameters._description: BASIS FUNCTION MODE: using Chebyshev polynomials with iterative refinement
optimization_parameters._n_basis_iterations: Number of refinement iterations (progressively adds higher-order basis functions)
optimization_parameters._n_basis_final_f: Number of f basis functions in final iteration
optimization_parameters._n_basis_final_s: Number of s basis functions in final iteration
optimization_parameters._n_basis_initial_f: Number of f basis functions in first iteration
optimization_parameters._n_basis_initial_s: Number of s basis functions in first iteration
optimization_parameters._basis_type: Type of basis functions: chebyshev, legendre, or power
optimization_parameters._basis_eps: Epsilon for coefficient bounds (keeps sigmoid away from 0 and 1)
